docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASHCALL INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2011 - CONTINUED FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-23-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON MAY-26-2026.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-26-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. SETTLEMENT PENDING - DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $2452.35, PLUS COSTS OF $140.00 IN PAYMENTS OF $300.00 PER MONTH COMMENCING JANUARY 25, 2011. IF DEFENDANT IS IN COMPLIANCE, SHE NEED NOT APPEAR AT PROGRESS REPORT HEARING. IF NO APPEARANCES, THE COURT WILL CONTINUE 4 MONTHS FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT AND DISMISSAL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
